title: Spicy Light Fermented Chicken Stir-fry
description: A romantic Portuguese dish featuring spicy fermented chicken with a tangy lemon twist, suitable for kosher dietary practices.
instructions: Wash chicken breast thoroughly. Pat dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and minced garlic. Marinate for at least 30 minutes to an hour.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil (1-2 tablespoons).
Add marinated chicken pieces and cook until golden brown on both sides. Remove from pan.
In the same pan, add red bell pepper slices and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add red pepper flakes and fermented black beans to the pan. Stir well and let it simmer for a minute or two.
Return chicken to the pan along with green onions. Add lemon zest and juice just before serving, stirring gently to combine all ingredients.
Serve hot as a main course.
